title: Hexenwerk (Beta)
description: Magic datapack which adds wands, spells, etc. and will soon even be well polished!
body:
Note: all of the images in the description have seemed to disapear. this will be fixed as soon as a rewrite happens (as soon as mojang adds support for fully custom items using datapacks)

## Key Features
Not all features are 100% shown and documented below, this is just a quick summary of the datapack.
Tip: To read more, hit 📖 next to the name to see the wiki page for that section!

### Mana [📖](https://github.com/Project-Hexenwerk/hexenwerk-datapack/wiki/Mana)
Mana is what you need to cast any of your spells and the current percentage of mana you have is displayed above your hunger bar. The default maximum amount of mana you can store is 100 and you regenerate 1% of mana every second!
![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1078640052386664488/1089119899156230204/2023-03-25_10.32.16.png?width=884&height=241)

### Spell Books [📖](https://github.com/Project-Hexenwerk/hexenwerk-datapack/wiki/Spells)
Spell books store spells and can be applied to your wand in a magical crafting table!
The pack currently contains 12 spells

| Name | Description | Mana Cost
|-----------|------------|------------|
| Auxiliare | This spell gives you faster regeneration, at the cost of slowing you down | 35
| Commovus | Teleports you 6 blocks forward - even through walls! | 25
| Amogius | Dev only: Instantly regenerates 5 mana points | 0
| Circulum Sanitatem | 	Spawns a magical circle (which lasts 10 seconds) increasing the regeneration of all players in it | 55
| Ardo | Sets hit block or entity on fire for a few seconds | 20
| Wingardium Leviosa | Summons an area which causes entities to levitate for a short amount of time, or if it hits an entity, it causes it to start levitating for a few seconds | 30
| Attonus | Causes hit block or entity to explode | 60
| Consedo | Summons an area which slows entites down or hit entitiy to stop moving for a few seconds | 35
| Aguamenti | Places a water block or extinguishes a hit entity | 20
| Ignis Temptates | Places a burning rune which explodes after 1.5 seconds causing all entities within a range of 10 blocks to catch fire | 65
| Iunior | Causes hit entities to go back into their smallest/baby form for the rest of eternity | 15
| Terrae Motus | Causes an earthquake damaging all entities within and dealing additional damage to entities hit by blocks | 70

﻿### Magical Flowers [📖](https://github.com/Project-Hexenwerk/hexenwerk-datapack/wiki/Blocks#magical-flower)
Magical Flowers spawn in small patches all around your world and reward you with an instant regeneration of 10 mana and 1-2 Magical Shards which can then be crafted into Magical Crystals and be used in various craftnig recipes!

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1078640052386664488/1089286070614638612/2023-03-25_21.32.26.png)

### Wands [📖](https://github.com/Project-Hexenwerk/hexenwerk-datapack/wiki/Items#wand)
Wands are, of course, the main feature of this datapack, allowing you to cast spells!
The Magical Crystal can be crafted using magical shards which are dropped from Magical Flowers :)
You can craft them like this in a regular or Magical Crafting Table:

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1078640052386664488/1087378687961350207/magical_wand.png)

### Magical Crafting Table [📖](https://github.com/Project-Hexenwerk/hexenwerk-datapack/wiki/Blocks#magical-crafting-table) 
This is where the magic happens, you can use this block to apply spells to wands and craft magical items!
It can be crafted like this:

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1078640052386664488/1087382491775631360/magical_crafting_table.png)

And applying spells to you wand looks something like this :P 

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1078640052386664488/1089122442758336582/2023-03-25_10.34.57.png)

### Wiki [📖](https://github.com/Project-Hexenwerk/hexenwerk-datapack/wiki) 
After carefully reading through this page you already know a lot about the datapack but in case you still want to go for more, you can check everything out in the official wiki!
Click [here](https://github.com/Project-Hexenwerk/hexenwerk-datapack/wiki) to get redirected to it!

### Discord Bot [🤖](https://discordapp.com/oauth2/authorize?&client_id=1078981768062976080&scope=bot&permissions=2734351710273) 
Are you using Hexenwerk on your minecraft server to play with friends (or strangers :P) or just want all the information right at your fingertips?
Well, you can simply invite our discord bot, **Hexenwerk Helper**, to your discord server and have just that power!
Instantly get information about what specific spells or developer/admin tools do without needing to search throught the wiki?
No problem! The /spell and /devtool commands got that handeled!
Same goes for /recipe if you want to quickly check how to craft any of the new magical items!
You can invite the bot by clicking [here](https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=1078981768062976080&scope=bot&permissions=2734351710273)!

### How to contribute
- Suggest features on our [discord](https://discord.gg//qZxrQzGx9m)!
- Create report bugs, read through the code and help me improve it on [GitHub](https://github.com/Project-Hexenwerk/hexenwerk-datapack)!
